attributes.action: Address pot hole situation in uk roads. These are extremely dangerous
attributes.additional_details:
Every road I drive in in Oxfordshire and Berkshire has dangerous pot holes. At night and when raining these can’t be seen 
I personally suffered an instant flat and was unable to host an important event. I was left on the highway of dark countryside road and it cost me £200 
Everyone is speak to is having to swerve to avoid constant large holes
attributes.background: Use the road tax more effectively to address pot holes urgently over less pressing road works

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Provide funding to repair severe potholes and compensate drivers
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760312

Legislate for the repair of potholes within a time frame in the UK.
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757761
